hypothesis: The prepared Q0.24 top-k score comparator cutout can be promoted from prepared RTL to simulator-validated evidence if Verilator is available. The smallest useful validation is to compile and run only rtl/task6/task6_q024_topk_score_compare.sv and rtl/task6/task6_q024_topk_score_compare_tb.sv against the checked-in expected-state oracle.

decision.rationale: The RTL and testbench still match the prepared expected-state surface by static readback, but no executable simulator or Python checker could start in this invocation, so the comparator remains prepared-only rather than PASS.
decision.next_gate: Recover command execution, then run: verilator --binary --timing -Wall rtl/task6/task6_q024_topk_score_compare.sv rtl/task6/task6_q024_topk_score_compare_tb.sv && ./obj_dir/Vtask6_q024_topk_score_compare_tb. If it passes, emit h2-q024-topk-comparator-cutout-result.json. If it fails, fix only the tiny comparator/testbench before moving to larger scorecards.
